title: The Wedding That Went Sideways
content: Planned a wedding once. Outdoor venue. Rain backup plan. What I didn't plan for? A power outage. AND rain. Same day. You know what saved it? Candles, a bluetooth speaker, and the fact that the couple loved each other. Best wedding story ever. They still thank me.
extended_content: I had planned for everything. EVERYTHING. Except the one-two punch of a thunderstorm taking out the power. We scrambled. Staff ran to buy every candle in a five-mile radius. Guests used their phones for light during the ceremony. The DJ played acoustic songs through a portable speaker. And you know what? Every guest said it was the most romantic wedding they'd ever been to. Sometimes the best plans are the ones you make when the original plan falls apart.
when_to_tell: when someone is worried about things going wrong
lesson: The best moments often come from the worst circumstances
